findings.description: HTML includes a large, upside-down image of the page content and is missing the correct inline images.
findings.evidence: PDF contains a right-side-up state seal, signature, and DEQ logo. HTML shows an upside-down snapshot of the page at the top and lacks the specific inline images in the extracted text below.

findings.description: Header layout is completely linearized, losing the spatial relationship of the text.
findings.evidence: PDF features names/titles on the left and right of a central seal. HTML lists these elements in a single, left-aligned column at the bottom.

findings.description: Reading order is heavily disrupted by the inclusion of an upside-down page image before the actual text.
findings.evidence: A user reading the HTML top-to-bottom encounters an upside-down visual representation of the page before reaching the extracted, left-aligned text.

findings.description: HTML includes a large, upside-down image of the page content and is missing the handwritten signatures.
findings.evidence: PDF contains two right-side-up handwritten signatures. HTML shows an upside-down snapshot of the page at the top and the signatures are completely missing from the text below.

findings.description: Loss of alignment and text formatting on the main heading.
findings.evidence: PDF heading 'NOTICE OF ISSUANCE OF MINING PERMIT' is centered and underlined. HTML renders this as left-aligned text without an underline.

findings.description: Reading order is heavily disrupted by the inclusion of an upside-down page image before the actual text.
findings.evidence: A user reading the HTML top-to-bottom encounters an upside-down visual representation of the page before reaching the extracted text.

findings.description: Heading hierarchy skips levels, starting directly with an h3 without preceding h1 or h2 elements.
findings.evidence:
The HTML contains '

NOTICE OF ISSUANCE OF MINING PERMIT

' but no

or

elements are present in the document.
